summary: Project involves a form submission system with an admin dashboard. Customer-submitted forms are not showing up in the admin dashboard in real-time.
known_issues: Customer form submissions not appearing in admin dashboard in real-time after submission

existing_features.title: The admin dashboard must poll or auto-refresh the orders list at a regular interval (e.g., every 10–15 seconds) so that any new customer submissions are visible in near real-time, even when the admin dashboard is already open.

new_feature_requests.summary: After a customer successfully submits a service order form, the admin dashboard must immediately reflect the new order without requiring a manual page refresh. The admin order list should be invalidated and refetched automatically upon any new order submission.

Verify that the backend `getOrders` (or equivalent admin order-fetching) endpoint correctly returns all submitted orders sorted by most recent first, including orders that were just submitted moments ago. Ensure there are no in-memory or stable storage inconsistencies that could cause a freshly submitted order to be temporarily invisible.
